mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement-where your every wish is our command! Feel the power of unlimited privilege with us."

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into Bank of Entitlement, ready to make a simple transaction, when suddenly, the teller has the audacity to ask for my ID. ID?! Do they not know who I am? I'm Hot Josh, CEO extraordinaire! I could feel the entitlement coursing through my veins as I dramatically slam my fist on the counter, demanding to speak to the manager. The nerve of these peasants to question my identity! After causing a scene fit for a royal, the manager finally appears, trembling. I give him a disdainful look and declare, "I shouldn't have to prove who I am to you people. My mere presence should be proof enough!" The manager, realizing his grave mistake, falls to his knees begging for forgiveness. With a smug grin, I graciously accept his apologies and demand VIP treatment for life at Bank of Entitlement. And that, my friends, is how entitlement truly triumphs.
